creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #36)

> There was a system tray notification: about software rendering, and the possibility of degradation. 
>
> I sensed no degradation. 

Thanks for the infos - arguably it should be slower than HW acceleration...

I thought that KWin would fallback to mesa llvmpipe, but obviously there's another graphics backend involved here. Anyway, hopefully this workaround isn't needed anymore.
